whyItMatters: Claude Code 2.1.172 has been released. 30 CLI changes Highlights: • Sub-agents can spawn nested sub-agents up to five levels, enabling deeper multi-agent workflows • 1M-context sessions without usage credits now auto-compact to standard limits, avoiding permanent stalls • Marketplace plugin browser (/plugin) adds a search bar to speed plugin discovery and r…
